"'''Who Shoots First?'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game. It portrays an alternative battle between [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], lampooning the "Greedo shoots first" edit made to the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] and the resulting [[Han shot first]] backlash.
